author: Ribeiro et al. (2016)
title: Why Should I Trust You? Explaining the Predictions of Any Classifier
why: Jelasin prediksi model apa pun lewat model lokal sederhana — dasar XAI

author: Sarwar et al. (2001)
title: Item-Based Collaborative Filtering Recommendation Algorithms
why: Fondasi recsys: rekomendasi dari kemiripan antar-item, bukan antar-user

author: Koren et al. (2009)
title: Matrix Factorization Techniques for Recommender Systems
why: Matrix factorization juara Netflix Prize — inti recommender modern

author: Lundberg & Lee (2017)
title: A Unified Approach to Interpreting Model Predictions
why: Nilai Shapley buat atribusi fitur yang adil & konsisten (SHAP)

author: Liu et al. (2008)
title: Isolation Forest
why: Deteksi anomali cepat: outlier gampang 'diisolasi' di pohon random

author: Chandola et al. (2009)
title: Anomaly Detection: A Survey
why: Peta lengkap teknik deteksi anomali, wajib baca sebelum bikin detector

author: Chen & Guestrin (2016)
title: XGBoost: A Scalable Tree Boosting System
why: Gradient boosting yang ngangkat ribuan kompetisi Kaggle, super scalable

author: Ke et al. (2017)
title: LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree
why: Boosting super ngebut pakai GOSS+EFB, hemat memori di data gede

author: Prokhorenkova et al. (2018)
title: CatBoost: unbiased boosting with categorical features
why: Boosting anti-bias buat fitur kategorikal, minim tuning

author: van der Maaten & Hinton (2008)
title: Visualizing Data using t-SNE
why: Visualisasi data dimensi tinggi jadi 2D yang enak dilihat

author: McInnes et al. (2018)
title: UMAP: Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection for Dimension Reduction
why: Reduksi dimensi lebih cepat & jaga struktur global lebih dari t-SNE

author: Friedman (2001)
title: Greedy Function Approximation: A Gradient Boosting Machine
why: Induk semua gradient boosting + konsep partial dependence plot

author: Rendle et al. (2009)
title: BPR: Bayesian Personalized Ranking from Implicit Feedback
why: Optimasi ranking personal dari implicit feedback, dasar recsys ranking

author: Cox (1972)
title: Regression Models and Life-Tables
why: Model survival paling ikonik: hazard proporsional buat data tersensor

author: Rosenbaum & Rubin (1983)
title: The Central Role of the Propensity Score in Observational Studies for Causal Effects
why: Skor propensity buat imbangin observasi, jantung causal inference

author: Card & Krueger (1994)
title: Minimum Wages and Employment: A Case Study of the Fast Food Industry in New Jersey and Pennsylvania
why: Studi upah minimum yang mempopulerkan difference-in-differences

author: Imbens & Lemieux (2008)
title: Regression Discontinuity Designs: A Guide to Practice
why: Panduan praktik RDD buat efek kausal di ambang batas cutoff

author: Angrist et al. (1996)
title: Identification of Causal Effects Using Instrumental Variables
why: Kerangka instrumental variable + LATE saat compliance ga sempurna

author: Andrieu et al. (2003)
title: An Introduction to MCMC for Machine Learning
why: Pengantar ramah MCMC buat ML — Metropolis, Gibbs, dll

author: Hastings (1970)
title: Monte Carlo Sampling Methods Using Markov Chains and Their Applications
why: Generalisasi algoritma Metropolis, fondasi semua MCMC modern

author: Geman & Geman (1984)
title: Stochastic Relaxation, Gibbs Distributions, and the Bayesian Restoration of Images
why: Asal-usul Gibbs sampling lewat restorasi citra Bayesian

author: Rasmussen & Williams (2006)
title: Gaussian Processes for Machine Learning
why: Kitab suci Gaussian process — regresi non-parametrik + ketidakpastian

author: Blei et al. (2017)
title: Variational Inference: A Review for Statisticians
why: Review variational inference: approx posterior lewat optimasi

author: Hoffman et al. (2013)
title: Stochastic Variational Inference
why: Variational inference skalabel pakai stochastic optimization, tembus jutaan dokumen

author: Neal (2011)
title: MCMC using Hamiltonian dynamics
why: Pakai dinamika Hamiltonian biar sampling ga jalan acak lambat

author: Hoffman & Gelman (2014)
title: The No-U-Turn Sampler: Adaptively Setting Path Lengths in Hamiltonian Monte Carlo
why: HMC auto-tuning, ga perlu set langkah — mesin di balik Stan/PyMC

author: Hensman et al. (2013)
title: Gaussian Processes for Big Data
why: GP tembus jutaan titik via inducing points + variational inference
